[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101011 5
1 1100010 3
2 1100111 5
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 0000000 a
7 0101001 3

01 10 0000000 a match 3 4 5 6
12 21 0010010 2
23 32 0011010 3
34 43 0011011 4

56 65 1100010 3 match 1
67 76 1100010 3 match 1
70 07 0100001 2

13 31 0010010 2

35 53 0001011 3

71 17 1000110 3

72 27 0100010 2
